feedItems.description: allocated £74.9m to Children's Social Care (≈£266 per resident)
allocated £122.1m to Adult Social Care (≈£434 per resident)
allocated £27.1m to Public Health (≈£96 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £119 (5.2%) to £2414
